name: XMax V3 PRO Silicone Adapter
summary: XMax V3 PRO Silicone Adapter — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Expand your product range with the XMax V3 Pro Silicone Adapter —a versatile accessory designed to connect the XMax V3 Pro Vaporiser to compatible glass water tools. This adapter enhances sessions by enabling smoother, cooler, and more refined vapour through water filtration. Engineered for universal compatibility, this adapter fits both 14mm and 18mm glass joints. It allows seamless integration with a wide range of bongs and water pieces, making it a high-demand accessory for users seeking enhanced performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
